agentChat.home.composer.placeholder: Start with what you want to test this round. Scope, target, and constraints all help.
agentChat.home.composer.pathReferenceFal: Please review these files or folders.
agentChat.home.hero.description: State a test goal and Ember keeps going with you.
agentChat.home.hero.supportingDescriptio: Test case authoring, scenario coverage, regression testing, and device automation stay aligned on one test goal, with context, environments, and execution history preserved.
agentChat.home.toast.systemPathDropUnsup: Cannot read system file paths. Drag files in from the built-in file manager.
agentChat.home.curatedTask.reviewSuggest: Switched to a better-fit test template based on the latest signal. You can keep editing before starting.
agentChat.home.quickActions.title: Quick start
agentChat.home.quickActions.description: Choose a test task template first, then keep adding details and follow-ups in this session.
agentChat.home.quickActions.preset.gener: Help me generate API test cases. Confirm the API spec, request params, auth, normal/exception scenarios, and assertions, then output a structured case list.
agentChat.home.quickActions.preset.joinN: Organize this test topic as a notebook: scope, environment, cases, defects, risks, and to-dos.
agentChat.home.quickActions.preset.creat: Help me design a reusable Skill. First define the use case, inputs and outputs, execution steps, and fallback strategy.
Create a test report structure for the current topic: scope, execution, defect stats, risks, and release recommendation.
agentChat.home.quickActions.preset.front: Help me design a test plan: scope, strategy, environments, resources, milestones, and risks.
agentChat.home.quickActions.preset.profe: Help me draft a defect report email. Confirm symptom, impact, repro steps, expected result, and priority.
agentChat.home.quickActions.preset.resea: Enter exploratory testing mode and help me roam scenarios, identify risks, find anomalies, and summarize coverage gaps.
agentChat.home.guideHelp.placeholder: What would you like to learn? Try: writing functional test cases / running regression tests / connecting device automation
agentChat.home.starter.guideHelp.label: Test guide
agentChat.home.starter.writing.label: Write test cases
agentChat.home.starter.writing.prompt: Help me write test cases. First confirm the feature under test, goals, preconditions, steps, expected results, and priority, then output a structured case list.
agentChat.home.starter.ppt.label: Test plan
agentChat.home.starter.ppt.prompt: Help me draft a test plan. First confirm scope, strategy, environments, resources, milestones, risks, and exit criteria.
agentChat.home.starter.researchReport.pr: Help me compile a test report covering scope, execution status, defect stats, risks, open issues, and release recommendation.
agentChat.home.starter.requirementAnalys: Break requirements into test cases. List feature points, boundary conditions, and exception paths, then output an executable case list.
agentChat.home.starter.video.label: Scenario coverage
agentChat.home.starter.video.prompt: Map user-scenario test coverage. List core, branch, and exception paths, then highlight gaps and suggested cases.
agentChat.home.starter.design.label: Case design
agentChat.home.starter.design.prompt: Help me design test case structure. Confirm module split, equivalence classes, boundary values, combined scenarios, and priority strategy, then provide a case template.
agentChat.home.starter.excel.label: Data-driven cases
agentChat.home.starter.excel.prompt: Help me organize data-driven test cases. Confirm fields, parameter combinations, expected outputs, and coverage matrix, then provide Excel headers and sample rows.
agentChat.home.starter.code.label: Automation script
agentChat.home.starter.code.prompt: Help me write an automation test script. Confirm the framework, target API or page, assertions, test data, and runtime, then provide an executable skeleton.
agentChat.home.starter.more.label: More test cases
agentChat.home.inputSuggestion.meetingNo: Summarize these test review notes: scope, key decisions, missing cases, owners, deadlines, and open risks.
agentChat.home.inputSuggestion.knowledge: Turn the following material into test assets. Keep confirmed facts, mark items to verify, and explain how to use them in case design.
agentChat.home.inputSuggestion.researchR: Write a test report. Clarify scope, execution results, defect distribution, risks, and release recommendation.
agentChat.home.inputSuggestion.pptOutlin: Draft a test plan outline. Confirm goals, scope, strategy, milestones, and key deliverables.
agentChat.home.inputSuggestion.requireme: Map requirements to test cases, including feature points, boundaries, exception paths, priority, and acceptance criteria.
agentChat.home.inputSuggestion.videoScri: Map user scenario coverage: core, branch, and exception paths, plus cases that still need to be added.
agentChat.home.guide.longTermPlan.title: How do I create a long-term plan?
agentChat.home.guide.longTermPlan.summar: Let AI plan tasks and run them on a schedule.
agentChat.home.guide.longTermPlan.prompt: Tell me how to create and use long-term plans. I want Ember to keep executing, reminding, and reviewing around a test goal.
agentChat.home.guide.addModel.title: How do I add a new AI model?
agentChat.home.guide.addModel.summary: Configure third-party models such as Ollama and Kimi.
agentChat.home.guide.addModel.prompt: Tell me how to add a new AI model in Ember, including provider setup, default model selection, and verification.
agentChat.home.guide.installSkill.title: How do I install and use Skills?
agentChat.home.guide.installSkill.summar: Install Skills from the store and enable them in chat.
agentChat.home.guide.installSkill.prompt: Tell me how to install and use Ember Skills. I want to turn a frequent testing workflow into a reusable skill.
agentChat.home.guide.knowledge.title: How do I add and use project knowledge?
agentChat.home.guide.knowledge.summary: Save knowledge from files, the composer icon, or chat results.
agentChat.home.guide.knowledge.prompt: Tell me how to add, confirm, and use Ember project knowledge for test assets and later case design.
agentChat.home.guideCards.label: Home guide help
agentChat.home.gallery.title: Start from these test tasks
agentChat.home.gallery.description: Scroll down for more test examples; execution still continues in this session.
agentChat.home.scrollCue.label: Scroll down to see what Ember can help you test
agentChat.home.secondScreen.label: Ember executable test task examples
agentChat.home.sceneManager.error.syncSi: Sign in to your cloud account before syncing Scene Skills management changes.
agentChat.home.sceneManager.error.create: Fill in the scene name, linked Skill, and template prompt.
Adjust the order and visibility of Home scenes and Skills. New entries sync to the cloud.
Wrap an existing SkillCatalog entry into a starter scene that matches your workflow.
agentChat.home.sceneManager.notice.noSes: No cloud session detected. You can preview the list, but saving requires sign-in.
agentChat.home.sceneManager.list.label: Scene Skills list
agentChat.home.sceneManager.field.placeh: Example: Which module should we test today?
agentChat.home.sceneManager.field.templa: Briefly describe when this template is useful
Starter text inserted into the composer when this scene is selected
